assessments.clauseTitle: VII. CI/CD & GitHub Pages Deployment Discipline
assessments.rationale: No Pages deployment signal found under .github/workflows.

evidence.observation: GitHub Pages deployment workflow is not present in current CI definitions.
evidence.impact: Public demo deployment discipline cannot be guaranteed from CI.

findings.summary: No Pages deployment signal found under .github/workflows.

recommendations.action: Add GitHub Pages deployment workflow that runs after successful master CI.
recommendations.verificationMethod: Run GitHub Actions workflow and verify Pages artifact publication.
recommendations.expectedOutcome: A tested build is automatically deployed as the canonical demo.
